calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Off Calendar

Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. of The Paras Law Group, 415-380-9226 for plaintiff and moving party Russell Brimer.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Consent Judgment IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW)

Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Continued To Oct-06-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephen Samuel Sayad, Esq. of PARAS LAW GROUP 380-9222, for plaintiff/moving party Russell Brimer

RULING:
PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER & defendant Beverages & More, Inc.'s Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Consent Judgment -- per request of counsel, the Court continued the hearing to October 6, 2005 at 9:30 a.m. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.

Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Consent Judgment

Richard Jacobs, Esq. of Howard, Rice, Nemerovski, 415-434-1600 for defendant and opposing part Beverages & More Inc.
